summary: W936 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while exposing W935's unit mapping-cone Quillen-conflation witness through degreewise strict MetrizableLCA short exact sequence data. The bridge boundedHomotopyLocalizedEndpointShortExactUnitConflationWitnessOfStrictExactPrimitiveW936 unfolds MetrizableLCA.quillenExactCategory to recover W935, then delegates through the W935/W934/W933/W932/W931/W930 route stack. Product success remains false because the W936 leaves are still explicit assumptions, and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W936 only refines W935's unit mapping-cone Quillen-conflation witness to degreewise strict MetrizableLCA short exact sequence data, while that witness and the rest of the W936 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W936 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W936 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, primitive relation-pullback and target-relation-lift propositions, primitive target-difference and target-codomain compactness quantifiers, primitive selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closed-map propositions, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, raw source-category pretriangulated and triangulated propositions, the raw source-side triangle-completion proposition, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ShortExact facts, bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields, and the strict unit mapping-cone witness.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.

Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
